source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A point luminous object \( (O) \) is at a distance \( h \) from front face of a glass slab of width \( d \) and of refractive index \( n \). On the back face of slab is a reflecting plane mirror. An observer seen the image of object in mirror (see figure). What will be the distance of the image from the front face as seen by the observer?

multiple symbolic variables (h, d, n) indicate compositional physics reasoning rather than direct retrieval
verifiability: answer_type=short_text with a specific symbolic expression
choices are provided, so the final expression can be checked against option C
there is an asset_registry issue noting possible answer_text formatting corruption, so verifiability is high but not maximal
